## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Abnormal Security and GrowthX to discuss ongoing SEO initiatives and content production.](https://fathom.video/share/xkajuKz6oPJxXN3W62aa_zzfZmk-i87_?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO efforts ramping up; focus on increasing awareness and eyeballs on website](https://fathom.video/share/xkajuKz6oPJxXN3W62aa_zzfZmk-i87_?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Blog content indexing progressing; glossary refresh underway with new features (images, FAQs)](https://fathom.video/share/xkajuKz6oPJxXN3W62aa_zzfZmk-i87_?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [Access issues slowing content publication; working on resolving Sydney's security clearance](https://fathom.video/share/xkajuKz6oPJxXN3W62aa_zzfZmk-i87_?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [Exploring ways to enhance content quality, including SME interviews and LLM citation tracking](https://fathom.video/share/xkajuKz6oPJxXN3W62aa_zzfZmk-i87_?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)

## Topics

### Q2 Initiatives and Goals

  - [Continuing optimized strategies from last quarter](https://fathom.video/share/xkajuKz6oPJxXN3W62aa_zzfZmk-i87_?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Major focus on SEO to increase awareness](https://fathom.video/share/xkajuKz6oPJxXN3W62aa_zzfZmk-i87_?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
  - [Aiming for tangible results by end of quarter](https://fathom.video/share/xkajuKz6oPJxXN3W62aa_zzfZmk-i87_?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [New product launches at RSA to generate buzz](https://fathom.video/share/xkajuKz6oPJxXN3W62aa_zzfZmk-i87_?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
  - [Overall goals: increase website traffic, hand-raisers, and accelerate sales cycle](https://fathom.video/share/xkajuKz6oPJxXN3W62aa_zzfZmk-i87_?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)

### Content Production Updates

  - [Blog posts starting to index on search engines](https://fathom.video/share/xkajuKz6oPJxXN3W62aa_zzfZmk-i87_?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
  - [\~10 out of 20 new blog posts published](https://fathom.video/share/xkajuKz6oPJxXN3W62aa_zzfZmk-i87_?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Glossary refresh in progress, focusing on high-leverage articles](https://fathom.video/share/xkajuKz6oPJxXN3W62aa_zzfZmk-i87_?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
  - [New features for glossary: images and FAQ sections](https://fathom.video/share/xkajuKz6oPJxXN3W62aa_zzfZmk-i87_?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Ramping up production pace, aiming for 2-3 publications daily](https://fathom.video/share/xkajuKz6oPJxXN3W62aa_zzfZmk-i87_?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)

### Technical Challenges and Solutions

  - [Sydney's security clearance process ongoing; exploring options to expedite](https://fathom.video/share/xkajuKz6oPJxXN3W62aa_zzfZmk-i87_?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [Discussing potential for Jason to get CMS access as a backup](https://fathom.video/share/xkajuKz6oPJxXN3W62aa_zzfZmk-i87_?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [Investigating options for FAQ module implementation (Asana request, existing tools)](https://fathom.video/share/xkajuKz6oPJxXN3W62aa_zzfZmk-i87_?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
  - [Planning to add FAQ content as text initially, then update with module later](https://fathom.video/share/xkajuKz6oPJxXN3W62aa_zzfZmk-i87_?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)

### Design Collaboration

  - [GrowthX team working to match Abnormal's unique design style](https://fathom.video/share/xkajuKz6oPJxXN3W62aa_zzfZmk-i87_?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
  - [Planning to set up meeting with Abnormal's designers for more detailed brand guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/xkajuKz6oPJxXN3W62aa_zzfZmk-i87_?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [Request for access to design assets (Figma/Canva) to streamline infographic creation](https://fathom.video/share/xkajuKz6oPJxXN3W62aa_zzfZmk-i87_?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)

### Content Enhancement Strategies

  - [Proposed SME interviews to generate unique, valuable content](https://fathom.video/share/xkajuKz6oPJxXN3W62aa_zzfZmk-i87_?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
  - [Exploring LLM citation tracking to optimize content for AI-driven search](https://fathom.video/share/xkajuKz6oPJxXN3W62aa_zzfZmk-i87_?tab=summary&timestamp=975.0)
  - [Aiming to provide actionable insights on content performance in AI contexts](https://fathom.video/share/xkajuKz6oPJxXN3W62aa_zzfZmk-i87_?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
